name: LetterboxdSync
overview: Real-time Letterboxd diary sync with duplicate detection
description: Automatically syncs your Jellyfin watch history to your Letterboxd diary. Supports multiple users, real-time sync on playback completion, duplicate detection, retry with backoff, and TMDb-based film matching.

versions.changelog: Dashboard with sync history, watchlist sync, diary import, reviews, Cloudflare backoff, rating sync, rewatch detection
Initial release: real-time sync, scheduled catch-up, multi-user, duplicate detection, retry with backoff
